ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: Balanced context relevance and persona consistency, but could improve naturalness in dialogue delivery. Overall quality is good with a slight room for improvement in making the response sound more conversational.
baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>Short note: Lacks context relevance and persona consistency, but naturalness and overall quality are adequate within a non-specific response framework.
